zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Hulton於大約1448年出生在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯時，他的父親John Hulton25歲，母親Catherine Knowles23歲。他和Elizabeth Bradshaw至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1537年在英國藍卡爾享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan de Hulton于大约1448年出生在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯时，他的父亲John Hulton25岁，母亲Catherine Knowles23岁。他和Elizabeth Bradshaw至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1537年在英国藍卡爾享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Hulton was born about 1448, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, his father, John Hulton, was 25 and his mother, Catherine Knowles, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Bradshaw. He died in 1537, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Hulton est né environ 1448, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Hulton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine Knowles, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Bradshaw. Il est décédé en 1537, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Hulton um 1448 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hulton 25 und seine Mutter Catherine Knowles 23. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Bradshaw mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1537 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Hulton è nato il circa 1448 nel Farnworth, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Hulton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Knowles, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Bradshaw. Morì nel 1537, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Hultonが約1448年にイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスで生まれた時，父John Hultonは25歳，母Catherine Knowlesは23歳であった。彼はElizabeth Bradshawとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1537年にイギリスランカシュアイアで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Hulton(이)가 대략 1448년 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hulton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Knowles(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Bradshaw(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1537년 영국 랭카실르에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Hulton nasceu aproximadamente 1448, em Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hulton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Knowles, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Bradshaw. Ele faleceu em 1537, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Hulton родился около 1448 г. в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hulton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Knowles, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Bradshaw. Он умер в 1537 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan de Hulton nació aproximadamente 1448, en Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hulton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Catherine Knowles, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Bradshaw. Murió en 1537, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años.
